title: cov_registry.tsv row schema
description: One row per PCAngsd covariance file (.cov) discovered under the configured pcangsd_dir. Produced by registries/build_registries.py. Used by downstream PCA / ancestry tools to find covariance matrices by chromosome scope.

cov_id.description: Filename basename of the .cov file without the extension.

scope.description: 'chromosome' if the cov is per-LG; 'global' if computed across the whole genome.

chrom.description: Chromosome name when scope='chromosome'. 'genome' when scope='global'.

cov_path.description: Absolute path to the .cov file on disk.

consistency_rules.chrom_required: scope='chromosome' rows MUST have a non-empty, non-'genome' chrom value.
